Typed checks: handler signature, provider on a method, provider without a return.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /a
func NoArgs() {}

//fabrik:http GET /b
func WrongOrder(r *http.Request, w http.ResponseWriter) {}

type T struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func (t *T) New() *T { return t }

//fabrik:provider
func NoReturn() {}

var _ = http.NotFound
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:5:1: handler NoArgs has the wrong signature
  help: want func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
error: web/web.go:8:1: handler WrongOrder has the wrong signature
  help: want func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
error: web/web.go:13:1: //fabrik:provider must be on a package-level function (func New is a method)
  help: move the constructor out of the method set
error: web/web.go:16:1: //fabrik:provider requires a return value (func NoReturn returns nothing)
  help: example: func NewGreeter() *Greeter
